author: Lata Evarts

ownerResponse.response: Lata thank you so much for being a great owner to work with!

author: Sam Carson
review: From my experience working with Real Property Management Teyata, I have found their services to be nothing short of exceptional. Kalli Hyde is an incredibly knowledgeable and efficient property manager who always goes above and beyond to

author: Connor Swift
review: I have been renting a home from RPM Teyata for a year now and it has been a wonderful experience. Our property manager, Kalli, has been helpful, attentive and takes our questions/concerns very seriously. Kalli and RPM Teyata is very

ownerResponse.response: Hi Connor. Thank you so much for leaving Kalli this awesome review. The Teyata team is appreciative of all of our amazing tenants!

author: Britney's Bullet Journal
review: Weve lived in this property for three months and locked ourselves out of our unit. We called the office, around 6:30 at night, and they were able to come out to us in under 30 minutes. They saved us a locksmith bill! Very grateful for their help.

author: Brandi Kincaid
review: Such a great team to work with! Responsive, thorough, and kind, they bring ease the process, helping ensure the best care for the renters and property. Its not often one thinks of ease when it comes to property management, but they make that possible.

author: Amanda Gain
review: I'm a current tenant of 2 years in the Blaine, WA area. Our contact, Logan, is fantastic! We've had some time sensitive issues - mostly due to the extreme weather we've had. Our pipes burst, despite taking several measures to prevent that.

ownerResponse.response: Amanda thank you so much for sharing your experience renting from us!

author: Jolyn Henry
review: Unprofessional, unresponsive, lied multiple times to my face, and continued to enable my landlord to blatantly break the law and attempt to exploit me. No follow-up on a number of sensitive issues such as known mold in the unit. Do NOT rent from these people if you can avoid it.

author: Rob Scofidio
review: We started using RPM Teyata in January of 2021, slowly transferring properties to them throughout the year.  We intentionally waited to review RPM until we had been working with them for a year.  With 9 units now under their management and

author: Kathryn Abrams
review: Very unresponsive company.  Would give negative 5 stars if I could.  Lack of communication and unresponsive.  Terrible experience with them.

author: Brad Connie Doerksen
review: Kellie and her team have done a fantastic job for us. What a relief to know that our property is being taken care of while we are stuck on the other side of the border unable to get there.  We love our little place and Kellie has laid all

ownerResponse.response: Connie & Brad, thank you so much for the beautiful recommendation of us here at Real Property Management Teyata! I have so enjoyed working with you guys and it has been my pleasure to keep an eye on your lovely vacation home and I'm excited to continue our working relationship as long as you need me I am here! ...& of course when that border opens we will get to meet in person!

author: Jennifer Morris
review: If you are considering this company for property management - skip it - the worst mgmt experience in 10 years - no management - breach of ageement- funds not paid - security deposits not paid - its a long list .....FYI

ownerResponse.response:
Jennifer,
 
Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. We are truly sorry in how this has played out, and is being perceived. However, the water coming into the basement and the necessary mold remediation were not our fault. We worked with you and the tenants to the best of our ability during the 5 months we managed your property.  We realize that you were unaware about the foundation issues that caused the primary bedroom and bathroom to be unusable to the tenants. This left both parties in an unideal situation as the tenants could not use/occupy part of their rental property, and you did not have the financial backing to support that fix at that moment. Per your email to the tenants (which we have, and can happily share), you agreed to let them out of their lease as well as agreed to refund all of their previous rent payments and entire security deposit. After they moved out, you changed your mind about this agreement and would not refund them. Taking this information into account and referring to your original email with the tenants, there was no fraud on our part. We then gave you all the rent we collected from the tenants from the date they moved in to the date they moved out (minus our management fees). We also provided statements twice a month through the contract period accounting for all funds collected. Yes, we did refund the entire security deposit back to the tenants as you originally agreed to do. Honestly, I was shocked to see this review because you know how hard we worked to keep them from seeking legal action, and in the best interest for you. We understand that a rental property is a huge investment on your end (the owners), and I am sorry that this was not a positive experience for you. I sincerely regret any negative feelings you may have gained due to this experience, and genuinely appreciate your feedback, and please know that we take all feedback, good and bad, very seriously. We can only learn from these experiences and do better in the future. 

Kindest regards,
The Teyata Team.

author: Donna Brown
review: I contacted Kellie through her website and she was very prompt at getting back to me. As it turned out her company is not able to accomplish my needs due to our location etc. HOWEVER, Kellie got right on the phone with one of her contacts

ownerResponse.response: Donna you are so very welcome!! I am glad I was able to be of assistance. If you or anyone you know ever need our help, all you gotta do is call!! :) Real Property Management Teyata thanks you for taking the time to give us such a lovely review!!

author: Paul Cunningham
review: We worked with Kellie Strong in getting into a rental home in Lynden. She was quick in her responses, informative, and accommodating. Since we couldn't be there in person, she gave us a virtual tour of the property and was quick to point out any marks on walls, floors, etc., which put us at ease. Can't recommend highly enough!

ownerResponse.response: We appreciate you taking the time to submit a review for us at Real Property Management Teyata!! Paul I can't wait to meet you and your family in person, I am so glad you are coming to the area and super happy to have helped with your peace of mind in having a secured place to call home when you arrive!  Welcome to the Teyata Family!

author: Rad Floria
review: Kellie is an absolute Rockstar. If your looking for a PM to rent your property look no further! Shes a manager who has your best intentions in mind and puts your time and agenda first. Extremely professional and easy to work with. I would highly recommend her to anyone I know in the business of buy and hold real estate.

author: Madison Gregory
review: Working with kalli has been a pleasure, and I highly recommend using Real Property Management Teyata!

author: Navdeep sandhu
review: Kellie is so professional and responsible. She managed everything with timely. She always happy and welcome you with  face. We are so lucky because we find Kellie as real property management teyata. She gives us solutions for every problem

ownerResponse.response: Thank You Navdeep, your comments made me smile big!!   I appreciate you trusting me and Real Property Management Teyata with your Investment and I am so happy to have found us the perfect tenant as well! I look forward to working with you and your wonderful family for a long time!!

author: Andrea Balzotti
review: Kellie Strong is the best! She used to work at my husbands office and had a great reputation for high ethics and great customer service, and we refer everyone to them now. She is super professional and responsive.  Highly recommend!

ownerResponse.response: Andrea, thank you so much for your recommendation, I sincerely appreciate it and your gracious words!!

author: Kanishk Sharma
review: If you are looking for someone to manage your property- Eric is your guy ! Really easy to speak with and always available, no matter what time you call. Had really wonderful experience with Eric in managing our rental property.

author: Von Schroeder
review: We would recommend this company and Kellie to our best friend.  She really cares about her clients and goes that extra mile to ensure a great outcome.  Kellie is very knowledgeable, professional and responsive.  We feel really lucky that we found her.

ownerResponse.response: Von, thank you so much for your recommendation and your lovely words! I so enjoyed meeting you and Chris and I am looking forward to working with you in the near future!

author: Breanne Thompson
review: Real Property Management Teyata did a great job at helping us find our condo. They were quick and reliable with sending us listings and thorough with any questions we had. I also really appreciated the personal help in doing a video walk

ownerResponse.response: That's awesome Breanne! We're here to help! Thank you for using Real Property Management Teyata!
